_meta.schema: v2 — adds per-prompt label{en,zh,ja,ko,es}; en/zh remain the canonical full prompt sent to the model.
_meta.note: Hand-curated for VidGo (premium TW e-commerce). Anti-hallucination structure baked in. Mirrored to backend/app/data/.

prompts.en: Pure white seamless paper backdrop with soft contact shadow. Lighting: large softbox top-left at 45°, 5500K daylight, gentle fill from right. Camera: 3/4 front, eye-level, medium shot. Mood: clean, premium, e-commerce ready. Keep the product's shape, label, color, and proportions identical to the input.
prompts.zh: 純白無縫紙背景，產品下方留有柔和的接地陰影。打光：大型柔光箱在左上 45°，5500K 日光色溫，右側淡淡補光。鏡頭：3/4 正面、與產品同高、中景。氛圍：乾淨、高級、適合電商主圖。產品的形狀、標籤、顏色與比例必須與原圖完全一致。

prompts.en: Light oak wooden tabletop with natural grain, soft cream linen runner under the product. Lighting: north-window daylight, 6000K, slight haze. Camera: 30° overhead, medium shot. Mood: airy, Japanese-modern. Keep the product unchanged. Avoid second products, hands, food spills.
prompts.zh: 淺色橡木桌面、原木紋理，產品下方鋪奶油色亞麻桌旗。打光：北面窗自然光、6000K、輕微霧感。鏡頭：30° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：通透、日式現代。產品保持原樣。避免出現第二件商品、手、灑出的食物。

label.ja: 暖ベージュ微セメント

prompts.en: Warm beige micro-cement surface with subtle textured floor. Lighting: single softbox front-right, 4500K, controlled soft shadow. Camera: front view, slight low angle 10°, close-up. Mood: warm minimal. Product silhouette, label and material preserved exactly.
prompts.zh: 暖米色微水泥檯面、地面有輕微紋理。打光：右前單顆柔光燈、4500K、可控的柔和陰影。鏡頭：正面、輕微仰拍 10°、特寫。氛圍：溫暖極簡。產品輪廓、標籤、材質完全保留。

prompts.en: Polished off-white marble (Calacatta Gold pattern) tabletop, brushed brass tray under the product. Lighting: window light from left, 5500K, soft reflections on marble. Camera: 3/4 front, medium shot. Mood: quiet luxury. Do not change the product's text, logo, or color.
prompts.zh: 白色拋光大理石（Calacatta Gold 紋理）檯面，產品下方擺放仿銅金屬托盤。打光：左側窗光、5500K，大理石上有柔和反光。鏡頭：3/4 正面、中景。氛圍：低調奢華。不可改動產品上的任何文字、商標或顏色。

label.ja: スペシャルティカフェ

prompts.en: Modern Taipei specialty café table: light oak surface, ceramic latte with leaf art beside the product, dried eucalyptus in glass jar. Lighting: window daylight, 5500K, gentle bokeh background. Camera: 45° overhead, shallow depth of field f/2.8 feel. Mood: cozy daytime café. Keep the product label and shape identical.
prompts.zh: 現代台北精品咖啡店桌面：淺色橡木檯面、產品旁有一杯陶瓷拉花拿鐵、玻璃罐中插乾燥尤加利。打光：窗邊日光、5500K、背景輕微散景。鏡頭：45° 俯拍、淺景深 f/2.8 感。氛圍：白日咖啡店、溫馨。產品標籤與外型保持一致。

prompts.en: Lunar New Year still life: red wax-paper backdrop, brass tea tray, dried persimmon and pine sprig as accents. Lighting: warm 3200K key from above, subtle gold rim light. Camera: front view, medium shot. Mood: festive, refined. Product unchanged.
prompts.zh: 農曆新年靜物：紅色蠟紙背景、黃銅茶盤、乾柿與松枝點綴。打光：上方暖色 3200K 主光、輕微金色側補光。鏡頭：正面、中景。氛圍：節慶、精緻。產品保持原樣。

prompts.en: Mid-Autumn Festival flat-lay: dark teal silk fabric backdrop, ink-painted moon-rabbit motif paper, osmanthus sprig. Lighting: overhead softbox 4000K, gentle shadow. Camera: top-down 90°, full product visible. Mood: elegant Chinese heritage. Preserve the product's pattern and label exactly.
prompts.zh: 中秋節俯拍：墨綠色絲綢布背景、繪有玉兔圖樣的水墨紙、桂花一枝。打光：頂部柔光箱 4000K、淡淡陰影。鏡頭：正俯 90°、完整呈現產品。氛圍：典雅、東方文化感。產品圖案與標籤完整保留。

prompts.en: Mother's Day pastel scene: pale pink cotton fabric backdrop, white peony bouquet half-out of frame, soft satin ribbon. Lighting: large diffuser, 5500K, very soft. Camera: 3/4, medium close. Mood: tender, gift-ready. Do not modify the product itself.
prompts.zh: 母親節粉嫩場景：淡粉棉布背景、白色芍藥花束從畫面邊緣探入、柔和緞帶。打光：大型柔光屏、5500K、非常柔和。鏡頭：3/4、中近景。氛圍：溫柔、適合送禮。產品本身不可改動。

prompts.en: Father's Day calm scene: dark walnut wood panel, charcoal grey wool throw, single brass desk lamp glow. Lighting: 3200K warm key from left, subtle ambient. Camera: 30° overhead, medium. Mood: mature, considered. Keep product label and color unchanged.
prompts.zh: 父親節沉穩場景：深胡桃木板、炭灰色羊毛披毯、一盞黃銅桌燈微亮。打光：3200K 暖色主光從左、淡淡環境光。鏡頭：30° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：成熟、深思。產品標籤與顏色不可變。

prompts.en: Skincare flat-lay: matte ivory ceramic tile, glycerin water droplets nearby (NOT on the product), single fresh green leaf. Lighting: overhead diffused 6000K, no harsh shadows. Camera: 75° overhead, medium close. Mood: fresh clinical clean. Do not alter the bottle, dropper, or label text.
prompts.zh: 保養品俯拍：霧面象牙白磁磚、旁邊散落甘油水珠（不可沾到瓶身）、一片新鮮綠葉。打光：頂部漫射光 6000K、無強烈陰影。鏡頭：75° 俯拍、中近景。氛圍：清新、專業。瓶身、滴管、標籤文字不可改動。

label.ja: スキンケア・ラグジュアリー

prompts.en: Skincare luxe: smoked glass shelf, brushed gold accents, single dried magnolia petal. Lighting: low-angle warm 3200K key from right, soft falloff. Camera: front, eye-level, close. Mood: high-end. Preserve product packaging exactly.
prompts.zh: 保養品奢華風：燻黑玻璃層板、霧面金屬配件、一片乾燥木蘭花瓣。打光：右側 3200K 暖光低角主光、柔和漸暗。鏡頭：正面、與瓶身同高、特寫。氛圍：高端。產品包裝完整保留。

label.ja: 夏のコールドドリンク

prompts.en: F&B drink scene: condensation-frosted ice cubes scattered around the cup, light blue ceramic surface, mint sprig out of focus. Lighting: 5500K side key, slight backlight to highlight liquid. Camera: 20° front, medium. Mood: refreshing, summer. Keep the cup, lid, label and beverage color identical to the input.
prompts.zh: 飲料場景：杯子周圍散落結霜冰塊、淺藍陶瓷檯面、薄荷枝散景。打光：5500K 側主光、輕微逆光凸顯飲料。鏡頭：略前 20°、中景。氛圍：清涼、夏日。杯型、杯蓋、標籤、飲料顏色與原圖一致。

label.ja: スナック × クラフト紙

prompts.en: F&B snack scene: warm beige craft-paper backdrop, scattered raw whole-bean ingredients matching the product (NO loose food touching the package). Lighting: window light from upper-left 4500K, gentle shadow. Camera: 45° overhead, medium. Mood: artisanal. Product label and shape preserved.
prompts.zh: 零食場景：暖米色牛皮紙背景、散落呼應產品的整顆原料（不可有散食碰到包裝）。打光：左上窗光 4500K、淡淡陰影。鏡頭：45° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：手作感。產品標籤與形狀保留。

prompts.en: Tea ceremony still life: dark slate stone tray, single celadon tea bowl with steam wisp, raw linen napkin. Lighting: 3500K side key, contemplative shadow. Camera: 30° overhead, medium. Mood: serene, traditional. Do not change product.
prompts.zh: 茶席靜物：深灰板岩茶盤、青瓷茶碗一只並有蒸氣絲縷、生亞麻巾。打光：3500K 側主光、沉靜陰影。鏡頭：30° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：靜謐、傳統。產品不可改動。

label.ja: ファッション大理石台

prompts.en: Fashion accessory scene: cream marble pedestal, soft satin drape, single dried palm leaf shadow on the wall behind. Lighting: 5500K key from front-left, subtle backlight halo. Camera: front, eye-level, medium. Mood: editorial. Preserve all product text, stitching, hardware.
prompts.zh: 時尚配件場景：奶白大理石平台、柔和緞布、後方牆面投有乾燥棕櫚葉陰影。打光：5500K 主光由左前打、輕微逆光光環。鏡頭：正面、平視、中景。氛圍：編輯雜誌風。所有文字、車線與五金保留。

prompts.en: Spring fresh scene: pale celadon green linen, single sprig of cherry blossom in glass bottle, light dappled shadows. Lighting: 5500K, dappled daylight pattern. Camera: 30° overhead, medium. Mood: fresh, gentle. Product unchanged.
prompts.zh: 春日清新：淡青綠亞麻布、玻璃瓶插一枝櫻花、地面有斑駁光影。打光：5500K、斑駁日光。鏡頭：30° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：清新、柔和。產品保留原樣。

prompts.en: Summer night-market vibe: warm string lights bokeh, dark wood counter, single red plastic basket softly out of focus behind. Lighting: 3000K warm key, golden bokeh. Camera: front 3/4, medium close. Mood: nostalgic Taiwan night market. Do not change product.
prompts.zh: 夏夜夜市風：暖色燈串散景、深色木檯、後方柔焦紅色塑膠籃。打光：3000K 暖主光、金色散景。鏡頭：3/4 正面、中近景。氛圍：懷舊台灣夜市。產品不可改動。

prompts.en: Autumn earthy scene: rust-brown linen, dried wheat stalks, terracotta plate. Lighting: 4000K from above, longer warm shadows. Camera: 45° overhead, medium. Mood: harvest, grounded. Preserve product exactly.
prompts.zh: 秋日大地系：鐵鏽棕亞麻布、乾燥麥穗、陶土色盤。打光：頂光 4000K、較長的暖色陰影。鏡頭：45° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：豐收、紮實。產品完全保留。

prompts.en: Winter quiet scene: white marble surface, single eucalyptus sprig, frosted glass vase. Lighting: 6000K cool daylight, soft snow-like shadow. Camera: 3/4 front, medium. Mood: clean winter. Keep product material, label and color identical.
prompts.zh: 冬日靜謐：白色大理石檯面、一枝尤加利、霧面玻璃瓶。打光：6000K 冷色日光、宛如積雪般的柔和陰影。鏡頭：3/4 正面、中景。氛圍：純淨冬季。產品材質、標籤、顏色完全保留。

label.ja: ミニマル・ギャラリー

prompts.en: Modern minimalist gallery scene: micro-cement floor, single sculptural shadow on a flat wall, no other props. Lighting: single hard 5500K key from above-left, well-defined shadow. Camera: front, eye-level, medium. Mood: museum. Preserve the product's exact silhouette and finish.
prompts.zh: 現代極簡藝廊：微水泥地面、平整牆面投出單一雕塑感陰影、無其他道具。打光：左上單顆 5500K 硬光主燈、陰影清晰。鏡頭：正面、平視、中景。氛圍：美術館。產品輪廓與表面材質完全保留。

label.ja: テック・アンスラサイト

prompts.en: Tech / electronic scene: dark anthracite acrylic surface, soft LED strip glow (cool white 6500K) along the back edge, no neon colors. Lighting: cool 6500K diffused, controlled reflection. Camera: 20° front, medium close. Mood: clean tech. Do not modify device color, ports, or branding.
prompts.zh: 3C/科技場景：深炭灰色壓克力檯面、後方邊緣有柔和 LED 光帶（冷白 6500K）、無霓虹色。打光：6500K 冷色漫射、受控反光。鏡頭：略前 20°、中近景。氛圍：科技、簡潔。裝置顏色、接孔、商標不可變動。

prompts.en: Outdoor living scene: pale sandstone tile patio, white linen lounge cushion partially out of frame, single olive branch. Lighting: 5500K natural daylight, mild golden afternoon tone. Camera: 30° overhead, medium. Mood: relaxed Mediterranean. Product label, shape and color preserved.
prompts.zh: 戶外生活場景：淡砂岩磁磚露台、白色亞麻坐墊在畫面邊緣、一枝橄欖。打光：5500K 自然光、午後微金色調。鏡頭：30° 俯拍、中景。氛圍：放鬆地中海。產品標籤、外型、顏色完整保留。

prompts.en: Modern minimalist style: warm white walls, light oak flooring, low-profile fabric sofa in oatmeal, glass-and-iron coffee table, recessed downlights at 3000K. Keep the room's original walls, windows, doors and ceiling height unchanged. Mood: calm, breathable.
prompts.zh: 現代極簡風：暖白色牆面、淺色橡木地板、低座椅高度的燕麥色布沙發、玻璃鐵件茶几、3000K 嵌燈。原本的牆面、窗戶、門和天花板高度都不可變動。氛圍：平靜、通透。

prompts.en: Japandi style: matte off-white walls, light oak flooring, low oak coffee table, beige linen sofa, single ceramic vase with dried pampas, paper-shade pendant lamp. Preserve the original room layout, windows and ceiling. Mood: restrained, warm.
prompts.zh: 日式 Japandi 風：霧面米白牆、淺橡木地板、低矮橡木茶几、米色亞麻沙發、單個陶瓷花瓶插乾燥蒲葦、和紙吊燈。保留原本房間格局、窗戶和天花板。氛圍：克制、溫潤。

prompts.en: Muji-inspired warm minimal: cream-white walls, light beech flooring, beige cotton-linen sofa, low solid-wood TV bench, soft pleated paper pendants, no patterned wallpaper. Keep walls, windows and doors unchanged. Mood: tidy, gentle daytime.
prompts.zh: 無印風 / 暖系極簡：奶白牆、淺色山毛櫸地板、米色棉麻沙發、低矮實木電視櫃、柔和褶紙吊燈，不使用印花壁紙。牆、窗、門保持原樣。氛圍：整齊、白日柔和。

prompts.en: Log / cabin warm wood style: full-coverage natural pine plank walls and ceiling, dark walnut flooring, brown leather sofa, plaid wool throw, brass-shade pendant. Preserve original architectural lines. Mood: cozy retreat.
prompts.zh: 原木 / 山屋風：原色松木板牆與天花板、深胡桃木地板、咖啡色皮沙發、格紋羊毛披毯、黃銅吊燈罩。原本的建築線條保留。氛圍：溫暖、避世。

prompts.en: Scandinavian style: bright white walls, ash oak flooring, white cotton sofa with grey throw, slim black floor lamp, single potted fiddle-leaf fig. Preserve room layout, walls, window frames, ceiling. Mood: bright, airy.
prompts.zh: 北歐風：亮白牆面、白橡木地板、白色棉沙發配灰色披毯、纖細黑色立燈、一盆琴葉榕。房間格局、牆、窗框、天花板保留。氛圍：明亮、通透。

prompts.en: Industrial loft style: exposed concrete wall (one feature wall only), reclaimed oak flooring, black iron-framed glazing, charcoal leather sofa, Edison-bulb track lighting. Keep original window positions and ceiling height. Mood: urban, masculine.
prompts.zh: 工業 Loft 風：單一主牆裸露水泥、回收橡木地板、黑色鐵件玻璃隔間、炭灰色皮沙發、愛迪生燈泡軌道燈。原本窗戶位置與天花板高度保留。氛圍：都會、陽剛。

label.ja: モダン・ラグジュアリー

prompts.en: Modern luxury (TW high-rise): smoke-grey microcement walls, herringbone walnut flooring, deep navy velvet sofa, brushed-brass details, marble side table, 2700K cove lighting. Preserve walls, windows, ceiling. Mood: refined evening.
prompts.zh: 現代輕奢（台灣大樓型）：煙灰微水泥牆、人字拼胡桃木地板、深海軍藍絲絨沙發、霧面金色細節、大理石邊几、2700K 線燈帶。牆、窗、天花板保留。氛圍：細緻夜晚。

prompts.en: Mid-century modern: walnut panel feature wall, brass pendant, mustard-yellow tweed sofa with tapered teak legs, geometric beige rug. Preserve room layout. Mood: warm 60s editorial.
prompts.zh: 中世紀現代風：胡桃木面板主牆、黃銅吊燈、芥末黃花呢沙發配柚木錐形腳、米色幾何地毯。房間格局保留。氛圍：60 年代編輯風、溫暖。

prompts.en: Bohemian style: terracotta-orange textured wall accent, layered Berber rug, low rattan sofa with cream cushions, hanging macramé planter, terracotta pots. Preserve walls, windows, ceiling structure. Mood: warm, eclectic, sun-soaked.
prompts.zh: 波希米亞風：陶土橘紋理主牆、層疊柏柏爾地毯、低矮藤編沙發配奶白抱枕、編織麻繩吊籃、陶土盆栽。牆、窗、天花板結構保留。氛圍：溫暖、多層次、日光感。

prompts.en: Coastal style: white shiplap walls, whitewashed oak flooring, pale linen sofa, navy-and-cream stripe throw, woven jute rug, brass marine-style sconce. Preserve original architecture. Mood: breezy seaside cottage.
prompts.zh: 海岸風：白色護牆板、漂白橡木地板、淡亞麻沙發、海軍藍奶白條紋披毯、麻繩編織地毯、黃銅航海風壁燈。建築結構保留。氛圍：海邊小屋、清爽。

prompts.en: Wabi-sabi: rough lime-plaster walls, raw oak floor with imperfections, low-slung futon sofa in raw cotton, single ceramic vessel with bare branch, paper screen lamp. Preserve room architecture. Mood: quiet imperfect.
prompts.zh: 侘寂：粗礪石灰塗料牆、帶有瑕疵感的原色橡木地板、低矮原色棉布墊沙發、單只陶器插一枝枯枝、和紙屏燈。建築結構保留。氛圍：靜謐、留白。

prompts.en: Mediterranean style: lime-washed white walls with arched accent niche, terracotta tile flooring, raw oak ceiling beams, cream linen sofa with rust-red pillows, woven wood pendants. Preserve walls and openings. Mood: sun-drenched.
prompts.zh: 地中海風：石灰白牆並有拱形主牆凹龕、陶土磚地板、原色橡木天花樑、奶色亞麻沙發配磚紅抱枕、編織木吊燈。牆面與開口保留。氛圍：日光浸潤。

prompts.en: French country: soft cream walls, vintage parquet flooring, distressed oak coffee table, slip-cover linen sofa, dried lavender, wrought-iron chandelier with cream shades. Preserve room layout. Mood: gentle countryside.
prompts.zh: 法式鄉村：柔和奶白牆、復古拼花地板、做舊橡木茶几、亞麻沙發布套、乾燥薰衣草、米色燈罩鍛鐵吊燈。房間格局保留。氛圍：柔和田園。

prompts.en: Traditional Chinese contemporary: ivory walls with dark walnut moulding accents, dark wood plank flooring, low celadon-blue sofa, single ink-painting scroll, paper-and-bamboo pendant. Preserve original walls and windows. Mood: refined heritage.
prompts.zh: 新中式：象牙白牆配深胡桃木線板、深色木地板、低矮青瓷藍沙發、一幅水墨掛軸、紙竹吊燈。原牆面與窗戶保留。氛圍：典雅、傳承。

prompts.en: Biophilic green: matte sage-green feature wall, light oak flooring, light cream linen sofa, three large potted plants (monstera, fiddle-leaf, snake plant), woven cane pendant, full-spectrum 5500K daylight. Preserve room structure. Mood: living, restorative.
prompts.zh: 綠意自然風：霧面鼠尾草綠主牆、淺色橡木地板、奶白亞麻沙發、三盆大型植物（龜背芋、琴葉榕、虎尾蘭）、藤編吊燈、5500K 全光譜自然光。房間結構保留。氛圍：生氣、療癒。

label.ja: トロピカル・リゾート

prompts.en: Tropical resort: full-coverage white walls, polished travertine flooring, rattan loveseat with white cushions, palm-leaf prints, ceiling fan, sheer linen curtains. Preserve room geometry. Mood: vacation calm.
prompts.zh: 熱帶度假風：全室白牆、拋光石灰華地板、藤編雙人沙發配白抱枕、棕櫚葉印花、吊扇、薄亞麻窗簾。房間幾何保留。氛圍：度假、放鬆。

prompts.en: Korean modern: bright off-white walls, herringbone light oak flooring, low cream boucle sofa, slim white-marble round side table, oversized framed minimalist art, soft 4000K cove light. Preserve original walls and windows. Mood: cafe-clean, photogenic.
prompts.zh: 韓系現代：亮米白牆、人字拼淺橡木地板、低矮奶色羊圈毛沙發、纖細白大理石圓邊几、大尺寸極簡裝飾畫、4000K 柔和線燈。原牆與窗戶保留。氛圍：咖啡店感、適合拍照。

prompts.en: Art Deco contemporary: emerald-green velvet feature wall, herringbone parquet, brass-fluted bar cabinet, geometric brass chandelier, jewel-tone velvet armchair. Preserve walls, windows, ceiling. Mood: theatrical evening.
prompts.zh: 新裝飾藝術：祖母綠絲絨主牆、人字拼地板、帶溝紋黃銅櫃、幾何黃銅吊燈、寶石色絲絨單椅。牆、窗、天花板保留。氛圍：戲劇感夜晚。

label.ja: モダン・ファームハウス

prompts.en: Farmhouse modern: shiplap white walls, wide-plank weathered oak flooring, slip-cover linen sofa, distressed wood beams across ceiling, black iron pendant. Preserve original architecture. Mood: heartfelt, lived-in.
prompts.zh: 現代農舍風：白色護牆板、寬版做舊橡木地板、亞麻沙發布套、天花板裸露做舊木樑、黑色鐵件吊燈。建築結構保留。氛圍：質樸、有生活感。

prompts.en: Loft style: brick-textured feature wall, polished concrete floor, modular grey sofa, black steel-frame coffee table, exposed black ductwork. Preserve original window positions and ceiling height. Mood: gallery loft.
prompts.zh: Loft 風：磚紋主牆、拋光水泥地、灰色模組沙發、黑鋼框茶几、外露黑色管路。原本窗戶位置與天花板高度保留。氛圍：畫廊型 Loft。

label.ja: テイストフル・マキシマリスト

prompts.en: Maximalist tasteful: deep teal walls, layered patterned rugs, plush jewel-tone velvet sofa, gallery-wall of framed prints, brass arc lamp. Preserve room layout. Mood: confident curated.
prompts.zh: 品味極繁主義：深松綠牆、多層次圖騰地毯、寶石色絲絨沙發、整面畫框畫作牆、黃銅弧形落地燈。房間格局保留。氛圍：自信、收藏感。

label.ja: クワイエット・ラグジュアリー

prompts.en: Quiet luxury hotel suite: soft taupe walls, woven wool carpet, deep camel leather sofa, brushed-bronze coffee table, single sculptural floor lamp, 2700K layered lighting. Preserve room layout, windows and ceiling. Mood: refined, hushed.
prompts.zh: 靜奢酒店套房：柔和灰褐牆、羊毛編織地毯、深駝色皮沙發、霧面青銅茶几、雕塑感落地燈、2700K 多層次照明。房間格局、窗戶、天花板保留。氛圍：細緻、靜謐。

label.ja: シネマティック・ドリーイン

prompts.en: Slow cinematic dolly-in toward the product over 5 s. Camera path: straight forward, no rotation. Subtle dust motes in a single soft sunbeam. Keep the subject's shape, label, color and proportions exactly the same.
prompts.zh: 5 秒緩慢電影感推鏡。鏡頭軌跡：直線前進、不旋轉。單束柔和陽光中有細小塵粒。主體的形狀、標籤、顏色與比例完全保持不變。

prompts.en: Slow 360° turntable rotation of the product over 8 s, fixed camera, soft top key light. Background remains static. Do not deform or relabel the product.
prompts.zh: 8 秒主體 360° 緩慢轉盤旋轉、鏡頭固定、柔和頂光。背景不動。不可變形、不可改動標籤。

prompts.en: Subtle parallax: foreground shadow drifts slowly across the floor, midground subject stays fixed, background slightly pans 2 px/frame. 6 s. Keep the subject identical.
prompts.zh: 輕微視差：前景陰影在地面緩慢移動、中景主體固定、背景每幀輕微平移 2 px。6 秒。主體保持完全一致。

label.ja: スロー・チルトアップ

prompts.en: Slow tilt-up reveal: camera starts at table level, tilts up to eye-level over 6 s, ending centered on the product. Keep product fidelity 100%.
prompts.zh: 緩慢仰拍：鏡頭由桌面高度於 6 秒內仰起至與產品同高，最後置中於產品。產品 100% 還原。

prompts.en: Steam wisps gently rise behind a hot beverage and dissipate. 6 s loop. Cup, lid, label and beverage color stay identical.
prompts.zh: 熱飲後方有蒸氣絲縷緩緩升起並消散。6 秒循環。杯體、杯蓋、標籤、飲料顏色完全相同。

prompts.en: Soft condensation droplets slowly form on a cold-drink surface over 5 s. Background unchanged. Preserve the product's branding and shape.
prompts.zh: 5 秒內冷飲杯身緩慢凝結水珠。背景不變。產品的商標與外型保留。

prompts.en: Soft golden bokeh fades in behind the subject over 4 s, then holds. Subject is locked center, no scaling. Do not alter the subject.
prompts.zh: 4 秒內主體後方柔和金色散景漸入後保持。主體置中、不縮放。不可改動主體。

prompts.en: Light cherry-blossom petals fall diagonally from upper-right at gentle pace over 7 s. Subject fixed, no warping. Keep brand and label visible.
prompts.zh: 7 秒內輕柔櫻花瓣由右上斜向下飄落。主體固定、無變形。品牌與標籤須清楚可見。

prompts.en: Single soft spotlight slowly sweeps left-to-right across the subject over 6 s, revealing material details. Subject does not move.
prompts.zh: 6 秒內單顆柔和聚光燈由左至右緩緩掃過主體、凸顯材質細節。主體不動。

prompts.en: Subtle rim light builds up behind the subject over 4 s, peaks, then settles. No motion of the subject itself.
prompts.zh: 4 秒內主體後方輪廓光逐漸增強、達峰、回穩。主體本身不動。

label.ja: プルアウト・リビール

prompts.en: Slow pull-out from close-up to medium shot over 6 s, revealing the surrounding scene. Subject stays sharply in focus.
prompts.zh: 6 秒內鏡頭由特寫拉至中景、揭露周邊場景。主體始終清晰對焦。

prompts.en: Smooth crane-up from front view to 30° overhead over 7 s. Subject remains centered and undeformed.
prompts.zh: 7 秒內鏡頭由正面平視升至 30° 俯角。主體置中、不變形。

prompts.en: Gentle film-grain and 2700K warm-color-grade fade in over 3 s, then steady. Subject identity preserved exactly.
prompts.zh: 3 秒內加入細微底片顆粒與 2700K 暖色調，之後保持。主體完全保留。

prompts.en: Floating particles (very soft, sparse) drift right-to-left across the background over 8 s. Subject fixed.
prompts.zh: 8 秒內背景有非常柔和、稀疏的浮粒由右向左飄過。主體固定。

prompts.en: Background gradient lighting slowly shifts from cool 6500K to warm 3000K over 6 s. Subject stays color-accurate.
prompts.zh: 6 秒內背景漸層光由冷色 6500K 慢慢轉為暖色 3000K。主體顏色準確不變。

label.ja: 背景ファブリック揺れ

prompts.en: Light fabric drape sways subtly in the background over 6 s. No motion on the subject.
prompts.zh: 6 秒內背景輕薄布幔輕微飄動。主體無動作。

prompts.en: Camera holds; subject shadow lengthens slowly across the floor as if a sun moved over 7 s. Subject identity unchanged.
prompts.zh: 鏡頭固定；7 秒內主體陰影宛如陽光移動般慢慢拉長。主體完全保留。

prompts.en: Soft falling petals around a fashion item over 8 s. Item is locked, only background petals animate.
prompts.zh: 8 秒內時尚商品周圍柔和花瓣飄落。商品固定、僅背景花瓣動態。

prompts.en: Slow lateral pan from left to right over 8 s, framing kept on the product. No zoom, no distortion.
prompts.zh: 8 秒內鏡頭由左向右緩慢平移、產品始終在構圖中。不縮放、不變形。

label.ja: アウトフォーカス・ハロ

prompts.en: Gentle out-of-focus ring of light slowly contracts toward the product over 6 s, ending in soft focus. Subject preserved.
prompts.zh: 6 秒內失焦光環朝產品緩慢收束、最終呈柔和對焦。主體保留。

prompts.en: Two-second pause, then slow 5° camera arc around the product (8 s total). Lighting unchanged. Subject preserved exactly.
prompts.zh: 前 2 秒靜止、之後鏡頭以 5° 弧線繞行產品（共 8 秒）。光線不變。主體完全保留。

prompts.en: Steady camera; very subtle 'breathing' fill light pulses every 4 s for 8 s. Subject does not deform.
prompts.zh: 鏡頭穩定；環境補光以每 4 秒一次的『呼吸感』輕微強弱、共 8 秒。主體不變形。

prompts.en: Hi, I'm here to introduce our brand-new product launching today. It's designed for everyday use, easy to clean, and built to last. The opening price for the first hundred buyers is on screen now — link in the description. See you in the comments.
prompts.zh: 嗨大家好！今天要為你介紹我們剛上架的新品。日常好用、好清洗、耐用度也很高。前一百名的開幕價就在畫面上，連結放在資訊欄，等你來留言！

prompts.en: This is our best-seller, and we just refreshed the formula. Same trusted feel, now with a smoother finish. If you tried our previous version, this one is the upgrade you've been asking for.
prompts.zh: 這是我們的長銷款，配方剛升級。一樣好用，使用感更滑順。如果你之前用過舊版，這就是你一直在等的升級版。

prompts.en: Three things I love about this product: it's compact enough for everyday carry, the material doesn't fade, and it pairs with almost any outfit. Tap the link if you want to see all the colors.
prompts.zh: 這支商品我最喜歡的三件事：尺寸好攜帶、材質不掉色、跟什麼穿搭都好搭。想看所有顏色就點連結。

prompts.en: Hi everyone, welcome to today's live. Make sure to follow so you don't miss the limited-time prices we'll be releasing during the stream. Drop a hello in chat so I know you're here.
prompts.zh: 嗨大家好，歡迎來到今天的直播！記得按追蹤，等下會放限時優惠不要錯過。在聊天室打個招呼，讓我知道你來了。

prompts.en: We're live for the next thirty minutes only. Three exclusive bundles, limited stock, free domestic shipping over a certain amount. Watch the on-screen banner — it updates as items go.
prompts.zh: 今天直播只開三十分鐘。三組限時組合、數量有限、滿額免運。看畫面下方的字幕，賣完會即時更新。

prompts.en: Use code at checkout for fifteen percent off your first order. Code is on screen and works on the full collection. Offer ends Sunday at midnight.
prompts.zh: 結帳輸入畫面上的優惠碼，首購享 85 折。全館適用，週日午夜截止。

prompts.en: First-time member? You unlock a starter gift on us — automatically added to your cart on your first purchase. No code needed.
prompts.zh: 首次加入會員？首購自動贈送會員禮，購物車會直接幫你加好，不用輸入優惠碼。

prompts.en: Free shipping island-wide on orders over a small minimum. We ship within one business day, with tracking sent straight to your phone.
prompts.zh: 全島滿額免運費。下單後一個工作天內出貨，物流追蹤碼會直接傳到你的手機。

prompts.en: Hi, thanks for reaching out. I can help you with order tracking, sizing questions, or returns. Send me your order number in the chat and I'll take it from there.
prompts.zh: 嗨，謝謝你聯絡我們。訂單查詢、尺寸建議、退換貨我都能協助。請在對話框留下你的訂單編號，我會直接幫你處理。

prompts.en: We're a small team based in Taiwan. Every order is checked, packed and shipped from our own studio. If anything's not perfect, message us and we'll make it right.
prompts.zh: 我們是一家位於台灣的小團隊。每一筆訂單都由我們親自檢查、包裝、出貨。如果有任何不滿意，私訊我們，我們會處理到你滿意為止。

prompts.en: We started this brand because we couldn't find what we wanted at the price we wanted. Three years on, our community keeps us honest. Thanks for being part of it.
prompts.zh: 我們會開始這個品牌，是因為找不到我們想要、價格也合理的商品。三年下來，是大家一直給我們真實回饋。謝謝你們。

prompts.en: Lunar New Year is here. We've prepared a small selection of red-packaging gift sets — limited quantity, ready to ship. If you're picking up presents for family, check the link in description.
prompts.zh: 農曆新年到了。我們特別準備了一系列紅色包裝禮盒，數量有限、現貨出貨。要送給家人的話，連結放在資訊欄。

prompts.en: Mother's Day is around the corner. We're including a hand-written card with every order this week — just leave your message at checkout.
prompts.zh: 母親節快到了。這週每一筆訂單我們都會附上手寫卡片，結帳時留下你想說的話就好。

prompts.en: Mid-Autumn gift sets are now available. We pair our best-seller with a small accessory in a giftable box. Limited to two hundred sets only.
prompts.zh: 中秋禮盒上架囉！我們把熱銷商品搭配一個小配件，裝在送禮包裝裡。限量兩百組，售完為止。

prompts.en: Wishing you a peaceful long weekend. Our store is still taking orders — we'll resume packing on the first working day. Thank you for your patience.
prompts.zh: 祝你連假愉快。商店持續接單，連假後的第一個工作天恢復出貨，感謝你的耐心。

prompts.en: Quick tip: shake before use, apply to clean skin, and store away from direct sunlight. Used this way, one bottle lasts about a month.
prompts.zh: 小提醒：使用前搖一搖，洗淨後再上臉，避免陽光直射。這樣用一瓶大約可以用一個月。

prompts.en: Here's a thirty-second guide to setting it up: open the box, peel the protective film, plug in, press the power button once. That's it.
prompts.zh: 30 秒安裝教學：開箱、撕掉保護膜、插上電源、按一次開關。就這樣。

prompts.en: If you're between sizes, size up. The fabric runs slightly slim and softens after the first wash. Detailed measurements are in the size chart.
prompts.zh: 如果尺寸介在中間，建議買大一號。布料偏修身，第一次洗後會變柔軟。詳細尺寸請看尺寸表。

prompts.en: Restock alert: the colorway you've been asking about is back in stock today. Quantities are smaller than last time, so if you've been waiting, now's a good time.
prompts.zh: 補貨通知：大家敲碗的那個顏色，今天正式補貨。數量比上次少，等很久的朋友把握機會。

prompts.en: We've moved to a new website, faster checkout, easier order tracking. Your previous account still works — just log in with the same email.
prompts.zh: 我們搬到全新網站，結帳更快、訂單追蹤更簡單。原本的帳號可以直接使用，用同一組信箱登入就好。

prompts.en: Thanks to everyone who supported our soft-launch — we sold through faster than we expected. The next drop is on the date shown. Sign up for the waitlist if you don't want to miss it.
prompts.zh: 謝謝參與我們先行販售的大家——比預期還快售完。下一批時間在畫面上，怕錯過的話記得加入等候名單。

prompts.en: If you got something from us, we'd love to see how you use it. Tag us in your post and we'll repost the ones we love. See you in the comments.
prompts.zh: 如果你也買了我們的商品，歡迎標記我們，我們會選喜歡的轉發。留言區見！

prompts.en: Cherry-blossom branches on cream background, soft pink (#F4C2C2) and warm grey (#A89C8E), Japanese washi watercolor, organic scattered repeat, seamless tile, no text or watermark.
prompts.zh: 奶白底上的櫻花枝、柔粉色 (#F4C2C2) 與暖灰色 (#A89C8E)、日本和紙水彩風、有機散佈排列、無縫貼圖、不可有任何文字或浮水印。

prompts.en: Single-line botanical leaves, deep navy (#1F2A44) on ivory, minimalist line-art, evenly-spaced grid repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 單線植物葉脈、深海軍藍 (#1F2A44) 印在象牙白上、極簡線畫、規律方格排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Tropical monstera leaves, sage green (#7C8C5C) on warm cream, hand-painted gouache, organic overlapping repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 熱帶龜背芋葉、鼠尾草綠 (#7C8C5C) 印在暖奶白上、手繪不透明水彩、有機交疊排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Geometric Bauhaus circles and triangles, primary palette (#E63946 red, #F1C453 yellow, #1D3557 navy) on off-white, flat vector, half-drop repeat, seamless tile.
prompts.zh: 包浩斯幾何圓與三角、主色 (#E63946 紅、#F1C453 黃、#1D3557 藏青) 印在米白上、平面向量、半落差排列、無縫貼圖。

prompts.en: Taiwan oolong tea leaves and small white tea blossoms, muted jade green (#6F8E7B) and ivory, ink-on-paper style, evenly-distributed repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 台灣烏龍茶葉與小白茶花、霧色翡翠綠 (#6F8E7B) 與象牙白、宣紙墨韻風、均勻分布排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Hakka-style florals (peonies, magnolias) reinterpreted in modern flat vector, deep crimson (#9B2A2A) and gold (#C49A4A) on cream, mid-drop repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 客家花布主題（牡丹、玉蘭）以現代平面向量重新詮釋、深緋紅 (#9B2A2A) 與金色 (#C49A4A) 配奶白、中落差排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Mid-autumn moon and rabbits, navy (#0F1A3A) on parchment, line-engraving style, scattered organic repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 中秋月與玉兔、深藏青 (#0F1A3A) 配米黃羊皮紙、銅版畫線雕風、有機散佈排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Lunar New Year auspicious clouds and koi, vermillion (#C41E3A) and gold (#D4AF37) on cream, traditional brush ink with subtle gradients, regular grid repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 農曆新年祥雲與錦鯉、朱紅 (#C41E3A) 與金 (#D4AF37) 配奶白、傳統毛筆暈染、規律方格排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Scandinavian folk reindeer and pine motif, charcoal (#2F2F2F) on cream, woodblock-print style, mid-drop repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 北歐民俗馴鹿與松木紋、炭黑 (#2F2F2F) 印在奶白上、木刻版畫風、中落差排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

label.ja: モロッコのゼリージュ

prompts.en: Moroccan zellige tiles, indigo (#1E3A5F), terracotta (#B5651D) and cream, ornate geometric tessellation, half-drop repeat, seamless tile.
prompts.zh: 摩洛哥馬賽克瓷磚、靛藍 (#1E3A5F)、磚橘 (#B5651D) 與奶白、繁複幾何鑲嵌、半落差排列、無縫貼圖。

prompts.en: Art Deco fans and rays, emerald (#046307) and brass (#B08D57) on black, vintage symmetric, evenly-spaced repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: Art Deco 扇形與光線、祖母綠 (#046307) 與黃銅 (#B08D57) 配黑、復古對稱、均勻間距排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Soft polka dots, dusty pink (#E0A6A6) on warm cream, gentle hand-painted dots, regular dotted-grid repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 柔和水玉點、霧粉 (#E0A6A6) 印在暖奶白上、手繪柔和圓點、規律點陣排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Liberty-style ditsy florals, mixed pastel palette (#F4C2C2, #C2D8E4, #DDE3B0), gentle gouache, scattered all-over repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: Liberty 風碎花、粉嫩混色 (#F4C2C2、#C2D8E4、#DDE3B0)、柔和不透明水彩、整體散佈排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Minimalist abstract waves, ocean blue (#1B4965) and ivory, single continuous line, horizontal repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 極簡抽象波紋、海洋藍 (#1B4965) 與象牙白、單一連續線條、水平排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Hand-drawn citrus slices (lemon, orange, pomelo), warm yellow (#F2C14E) and coral (#F08080) on cream, gouache illustration, scattered repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 手繪柑橘切片（檸檬、柳橙、文旦）、暖黃 (#F2C14E) 與珊瑚紅 (#F08080) 配奶白、不透明水彩插畫、散佈排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Mountain silhouettes (Yushan / Alishan inspiration), layered jade greens and grey-blues, flat-color block-print, horizontal half-drop, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 山稜線剪影（玉山／阿里山靈感）、層疊翡翠綠與灰藍、平塗版畫風、水平半落差排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Abstract terrazzo, neutral cream base with chips of sage, terracotta, charcoal, photo-real terrazzo material, organic random repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 抽象水磨石、奶白底配鼠尾草綠、磚紅、炭黑碎片、寫實水磨石質感、有機隨機排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Origami cranes, ivory and warm grey, paper-fold flat illustration, mid-drop repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 摺紙紙鶴、象牙白與暖灰、紙摺風平面插畫、中落差排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Coastal coral and scallops, dusty coral (#E0997D) and sand cream, watercolor with soft edges, scattered repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 海岸珊瑚與扇貝、霧珊瑚 (#E0997D) 與砂奶白、邊緣柔和水彩、散佈排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Geometric herringbone, dusty terracotta and warm cream, two-tone flat, dense regular repeat, seamless tile.
prompts.zh: 幾何人字紋、霧磚紅與暖奶白、雙色平面、密集規律排列、無縫貼圖。

prompts.en: Ink wash bamboo grove, charcoal (#2C2C2C) on rice-paper cream, traditional brush style with negative space, vertical repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 墨韻竹林、炭黑 (#2C2C2C) 印在米黃宣紙上、傳統毛筆風並有留白、垂直排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。

prompts.en: Modern geometric tiles, soft sage (#9CAF88) and cream, half-circle and quarter-arc shapes, half-drop repeat, seamless tile, no text.
prompts.zh: 現代幾何磁磚、柔和鼠尾草綠 (#9CAF88) 與奶白、半圓與四分之一弧、半落差排列、無縫貼圖、無文字。
